calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields #7235

Petitioner Erika Mendoza was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Anthony Mendoza, and with Spanish Interpreter: Mayra Ontibero. Petitioner and Interpreter was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.
The Court granted the request dispensing notice to the minor's father Jose Alvarez, signing an order for same in open court.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Anthony Chel Mendoza.
Decree Changing Name of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
